description: A styled `<a>` element. Comes in three sizes, an inline variant for in-prose links, optional trailing icon, optional visited styles, and `asChild` for routing-library integration.

meta.docs:
# Link

A styled `<a>` element. Comes in three sizes, an inline variant for in-prose links, optional trailing icon, optional visited styles, and `asChild` for routing-library integration.

## When to use

- **External or internal navigation** — anywhere a user clicks to go somewhere else.
- **In-text references** — use `inline` so the underline is always visible.
- **As a routed link** — wrap with `asChild` and pass your router's `<NavLink>` or `<RouterLink>` as the only child.

## When not to use

- **Action buttons** — clicks that don't navigate (e.g. "Submit", "Open dialog") should be a `Button`.
- **Plain decorative anchors** — if there's no destination, don't use a link.

## Composition

- The default rendered element is `<a>`. With `asChild`, it acts as a `Slot` and forwards props to the child component (e.g. `react-router`'s `NavLink`).
- `renderIcon` accepts a Lucide-style icon component and renders it after the label.
- `visited={true}` opts in to a purple visited colour. Carbon enables this opt-in too.
- `disabled` sets `aria-disabled` and removes the element from the tab order — but the underlying `<a>` still renders (set `href={undefined}` if you want to remove navigation).
meta.migrationGuide:
# Link — Carbon → shadcn migration guide Carbon's `Link` is a polymorphic styled ``. shadcn doesn't ship a `Link` primitive — this wrapper recreates the API in plain HTML + Tailwind so call sites can swap imports without changing prop names. ## Mapping | Carbon prop | shadcn prop | Notes | |---|---|---| | `href` | `href` | Native anchor attribute. | | `target` | `target` | Native. | | `size` | `size` | `sm` / `md` (default) / `lg`. Tailwind `text-xs/sm/base`. | | `inline` | `inline` | Forces underline-always for in-prose links. | | `disabled` | `disabled` | Sets `aria-disabled` + `tabIndex={-1}`. The anchor still renders. | | `visited` | `visited` | Opts in to a purple `:visited` style. | | `renderIcon` | `renderIcon` | Pass a component (e.g. `ArrowRight` from `lucide-react`). Rendered after the label. | | polymorphic `as` | `asChild` | shadcn uses `asChild` (Radix `Slot`) instead of an `as` prop. | | `aria-current` | `aria-current` | Native ARIA, forwarded. | ## Carbon features missing in shadcn - **`as` prop for polymorphism** — shadcn uses `asChild` instead. `…`. - **`` rendering as `

`** — Carbon swaps to a `

` when disabled. shadcn keeps the `` but adds `aria-disabled` and removes it from tab order. ## shadcn features missing in Carbon - **`asChild` (`Slot`-based)** — cleaner integration with `react-router-dom`'s `Link` / `NavLink`. - **CVA variants** — easy to extend by editing `linkVariants` if you need a `danger` colour, etc. ## Behavioural differences - **Disabled rendering** — see above. If you rely on Carbon's `

` swap (e.g. CSS targets `p[disabled]`), update those rules to target `[data-slot=link][aria-disabled=true]`. - **Visited colour** — Carbon: subtle purple. shadcn: `text-purple-600`. Override via `className` if your design tokens disagree. - **Default underline** — Carbon: only shown on hover unless `inline`. shadcn matches. ## Migration checklist 1. Swap the import. 2. If you used `` — switch to `…`. 3. If you used `disabled` and depended on `

` rendering — update CSS to `[data-slot=link][aria-disabled=true]` (or remove `href` to hide navigation). 4. If you have custom hover/focus tokens — extend `linkVariants` rather than overriding inline.
